_comment: GenAI L2 Support Assistant — Flow Designer Export (Placeholder)
1. Navigate to Flow Designer (flow_designer.do) in ServiceNow.
2. Click 'Import Flow' and upload this JSON.
3. Alternatively, recreate the flow manually using the structure below.
4. Activate the flow after configuring the REST endpoint properties.
NOTE: This is a structural placeholder. ServiceNow Flow Designer
exports use a proprietary format tied to instance-specific sys_ids.
Use this as a reference to manually build the flow in your instance.

flow.name: GenAI AI Analysis Flow
flow.description: Triggers AI-powered incident analysis when a new incident is created or assignment changes. Sends incident data to the GenAI FastAPI backend and polls for results.

conditions._comment: Fires on new incidents OR when assigned_to field changes

actions.name: Build Webhook Payload
actions.description: Construct the JSON payload with incident fields for the AI backend.

actions.name: Send to GenAI Backend
actions.description: POST incident data to the FastAPI webhook endpoint.

actions.name: Log Success
actions.description: Log successful trigger for audit trail.

script.body: gs.info('[GenAI Flow] AI analysis triggered for ' + trigger.record.number + ', recommendation_id=' + step_2.body.recommendation_id);

actions.name: Handle Error
actions.description: Log error but do not block incident processing.

script.body: gs.error('[GenAI Flow] Failed to trigger AI analysis for ' + trigger.record.number + '. HTTP ' + step_2.status_code + ': ' + step_2.body);
